steps.title: Read the y-intercept from the graph
steps.content: The line crosses the y-axis at the point $(0, 2)$.

steps.title: Substitute the point into the equation
steps.content:
Substitute $(0, 2)$ into $6x + By = 18$:

$$6(0) + B(2) = 18$$
$$2B = 18$$
$$B = 9$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
